ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the election entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the election took place */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the election occurred */,
  "election_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of election (e.g., presidential, gubernatorial) */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats available in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_election_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_type_id") REFERENCES election_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election they participated in */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "running_mate_id" INTEGER /* Running mate's candidate ID (for presidential elections) */,
  "is_incumbent" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the candidate is an incumbent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome entry */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate's entry */,
  "outcome" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the candidate won (1) or lost (0) */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "percentage_votes" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "party_description" TEXT /* Description of the political party's platform or ideology */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party name (e.g., 'D' for Democrat, 'R' for Republican) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election associated with the access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the user's action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the demographic data entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election associated with the demographic data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of voters (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of voters (e.g., male, female, non-binary) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the demographic group */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout for this demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the turnout entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election associated with the turnout data */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters for the election */,
  "total_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the election */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Calculated percentage of voter turnout */,
  "voter_turnout_by_age" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage by age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the campaign entry */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate running the campaign */,
  "campaign_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_strategy" TEXT /* Overview of the campaign strategy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the type of election */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the election type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
